title: The Ring and Lilo & Stitch actress Daveigh Chase dies aged 35
description: Chase died from sepsis following a bout with meningitis in a Los Angeles hospital, her longtime manager told the BBC.
text: Daveigh Chase, the horror actress. crawled out of. A telly in The Ring and. voiced Lilo. In Disney's animated Lilo & Stitch, has died aged 35. Chase. also starred in the cable drama Big. Love, died from sepsis following a bout with. Meningitis in a Los Angeles hospital, her longtime. Manager John Ryan Jr confirmed to BBC News on Wednesday. Ryan said that Chase had been admitted to.
thai_text: ข่าวนี้จาก BBC News อยู่ในหมวดข่าวต่างประเทศ หัวข้อคือ “The Ring and Lilo & Stitch actress Daveigh Chase dies aged 35”. ใจความหลักคือ Daveigh Chase, the horror actress, crawled out of. A telly in The Ring and, voiced Lilo. In Disney's animated Lilo & Stitch, has died aged 35. Chase, also starred in the cable drama Big. สรุปง่าย ๆ คือข่าวนี้เล่าว่าเกิดอะไรขึ้น ใครเกี่ยวข้อง และทำไมเรื่องนี้จึงควรติดตามต่อ. คำสำคัญที่ควรรู้: actress = คำว่า actress / admitted = คำว่า admitted / aged = คำว่า aged / angeles = คำว่า angeles / animated = คำว่า animated.
